title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.290 - Appeals from decision of board, notice of right
text:
338.290.  Appeals from decision of board, notice of right. — Any person denied a permit to establish or operate a pharmacy, or renewal of such permit, may appeal the decision of the board of pharmacy in the manner provided by law, and shall be notified of this right at the time of denial.
(L. 1951 p. 734 § 5, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16)
